creator: boris.tassou@securmail.fr
text:
and There you go!

[root@skoh ~]# grep PidFile /usr/local/etc/zabbix5/zabbix_agentd.conf
### Option: PidFile
# PidFile=/var/run/zabbix/zabbix_agentd.pid

drwxr-xr-x   2 zabbix  zabbix   512 Dec 17 22:51 .

-rw-rw-r--   1 zabbix  zabbix     5 Dec 17 22:52 zabbix_agentd.pid
